changes.exact_quote: Custodian may designate a distribution unsupported for operational convenience even though Customer has not declined support and law does not prohibit it; Customer is credited 0%, and Custodian retains 25%. Custodian posts a distribution notice within 7 days and keeps the claim workflow open for 30 days.
changes.proposed_redline: Unless Customer expressly declines support or applicable law prohibits support, Customer is entitled to forks, airdrops, staking rewards, and similar network distributions attributable to Customer Assets.

changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Customer will process release requests in the ordinary course when staffing, chain conditions, and portfolio review procedures permit, and estimated timing shown in the portal is nonbinding.
changes.proposed_redline: Custodian will process Authorized Instructions for withdrawals within 24 hours after receipt and in any event no later than 2 business days after receipt, except to the extent delayed by applicable law, a network outage, or a documented security hold notified to Customer.

changes.exact_quote: Custodian may pledge or rehypothecate Customer Assets for its own account without Customer consent.
changes.proposed_redline: Customer retains all beneficial ownership of Customer Assets, and Custodian will not lend, pledge, rehypothecate, transfer, encumber, or use Customer Assets for Custodian's own account without Customer's prior written consent.

changes.exact_quote: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties. Custodian's portal status page will be the exclusive source for operational-control information, and Custodian has no duty to provide supplemental evidence after incidents or control changes.
changes.proposed_redline: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
